authority: Singapore Food Agency / Singapore Statutes Online
Ministry of Health Malaysia / Food Regulations 1985
Thai FDA / Ministry of Public Health

sources.name: Thai FDA - Food Division
sources.notes: Main Thai FDA food regulatory portal. Use for food additives, labelling, contaminants and food safety notices.

authority: Ministry of Food and Drug Safety (MFDS)

sources.name: MFDS English Food Regulations
sources.notes: MFDS English regulation announcements and translated food standards.

sources.name: Korea Food Code - Common Standards
sources.notes: General food standards and specifications.

authority: Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare (MHLW)

sources.name: MHLW Food Safety
sources.notes: Main Japan food safety portal, including Food Sanitation Act and specifications for food additives.

sources.name: Japan Food Sanitation Act
sources.notes: Legal basis for food safety, food additives and sanitation controls.

authority: Food Safety and Standards Authority of India (FSSAI)

sources.name: FSSAI Food Additives Regulations Compendium
sources.notes: Food Products Standards and Food Additives Regulations.

sources.name: FSSAI Labelling and Display Regulations
sources.notes: Use for allergen declaration, nutrition labelling and food labelling rules.

sources.name: BFSA Draft / Regulations Page
sources.notes: BFSA page listing food safety regulations, including microbial contaminant controls.

sources.name: Food Safety Microbiological Contaminants Regulation 2023
sources.notes: Microbiological contaminant regulation.

sources.name: GSO Standards Store
sources.notes: Main GSO standards portal. Search for GSO food additives, contaminants, labelling and microbiological criteria.

sources.name: GSO 1016:2015 Microbiological Criteria for Foodstuffs
sources.notes: Microbiological limits for foodstuffs and food ingredients.

authority: Regional grouping - use GCC/GSO plus country-specific authorities

sources.name: GSO Standards Store
sources.notes: Use for GCC countries. Middle East is not one regulatory jurisdiction, so add Saudi, UAE, Qatar, Kuwait, Oman, Bahrain, Iran, etc. separately where needed.

sources.name: FDA Food Additive Listings
sources.notes: FDA food and color additive listings.

sources.name: FDA Substances Added to Food
sources.notes: Inventory of food additives, color additives, GRAS substances and other substances added to food.

sources.name: FDA Chemical Contaminants Transparency Tool
sources.notes: FDA consolidated contaminant levels, including tolerances, action levels and guidance levels.

sources.name: FDA Food Allergies
sources.notes: Major food allergens including sesame as the ninth major allergen.

authority: National Health Commission / SAMR / GB Food Safety Standards

sources.name: China GB 2760 Food Additive Use Standard - Reference Translation
sources.notes: Unofficial English translation of GB 2760 food additive use standard. Verify against current Chinese official GB standards.

sources.name: China National Food Safety Standards Information
sources.notes: Official National Health Commission portal. Use Chinese GB standards as legal source.

sources.name: BPOM Official Website
sources.notes: Main BPOM regulatory website. Search for PerBPOM food additive limits, processed food contaminants, allergens and labelling.

sources.name: BPOM JDIH Legal Database
sources.notes: Official BPOM legal database for regulations.

sources.name: Iran Food and Drug Administration
sources.notes: Main IFDA portal. Use Persian regulations as the legal source.

sources.name: TFDA Food Laws and Regulations
sources.notes: Main TFDA English food regulation portal.

sources.name: Taiwan Food Allergen Labeling Regulation
sources.notes: Allergen labelling requirements for prepackaged food.

sources.name: Taiwan Sanitation Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food
sources.notes: Contaminant and toxin limits.

sources.name: Philippines FDA Official Website
sources.notes: Main FDA Philippines portal.

sources.name: Philippines FDA Microbiological Requirements Circular 2022-012
sources.notes: Microbiological requirements for certain prepackaged processed food products.

sources.name: Philippine National Standards
sources.notes: Product standards including some food categories.

authority: Ministry of Health / Vietnam Food Administration

sources.name: Vietnam Food Administration
sources.notes: Main Vietnam Food Administration portal.

sources.name: Vietnam Food Safety Law and Decree 15/2018 Reference
sources.notes: Vietnam government legal document database. Search for Law on Food Safety, Decree 15/2018/ND-CP and QCVN standards.
